fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the VAT statement template you are about to create.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the VAT statement template.

fields.name: Page ID
fields.tooltip:
Contains the number of the window (form) in which the program displays the VAT statement lines. To see the form IDs that are available, choose the field.
The program automatically enters in this field the form ID that comes with the program. You can select a different form ID if your program contains more than one.

fields.name: VAT Statement Report ID
fields.tooltip:
Contains the ID of the report that you can print for the VAT statement template. To see the reports that are available, choose the field.
The program automatically enters in this field the standard VAT statement report ID that comes with the program. You can select a different VAT statement report ID if your program contains more than one.

fields.name: Page Caption
fields.tooltip:
Contains the name of the window (form) in which the program displays the VAT statement journal template.
The program automatically enters in this field the form name corresponding to the form ID selected in the Page ID field.

fields.name: VAT Statement Report Caption
fields.tooltip:
Contains the name of the VAT statement report that can be printed.
The program automatically fills in this field with the VAT statement name corresponding to the VAT statement report ID selected in the VAT Statement Report ID field.
